name: Triangle Function Parameter Parser
description: Parses natural language query to extract function parameters for triangle area calculation and formats them according to the expected output structure
reasoning: This workflow needs to parse the natural language prompt to extract the triangle parameters (base, height, unit) and format them into the exact JSON structure required. Since this involves understanding natural language and extracting structured parameters, an LLM-based approach is most appropriate. The task requires a single sequential extraction step followed by formatting the output in the expected nested structure.
